channel.title: jb-marketplace-plugins-jetbrains
channel.description: The latest JetBrains plugins on the JetBrains marketplace
channel.dc:creator: Jonathan Lermitage

item.title: Godot Sidecar File Nesting - Fri Jun 12 17:17:03 UTC 2026
item.description:
Nests Godot sidecar files like .uid and ..translation under their matching files in tree views.
vendor: LeeGod downloads: 1 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: dev.imanity.godot.uidnesting

item.title: Markdown Image Paster - Sat Jun 13 07:42:57 UTC 2026
item.description:
Paste images into Markdown files — auto-saved to the correct directory based on front matter rules. Why this plugin? Jekyll / Hexo and other static blog frameworks...
vendor: Yungyu downloads: 2 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: io.github.yungyu16.markdown-image-paster

item.title: Rip and Tear - Fri Jun 12 12:55:47 UTC 2026
item.description:

vendor: NerfLabs downloads: 2 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.nerflabs.intellijdoom

item.title: Wiremark - Thu Jun 11 21:20:56 UTC 2026

item.title: Bitbucket PR Reviewer - Sat Jun 13 07:22:34 UTC 2026
item.description:
